data.name: Don't Disturb Your BOSS
data.detailed_description:
🏢💦你已抵達辦公室💦🏢

扮演這家機構的新人，你需要模擬完成一些小工作任務，以避免受到懲罰（或者受到懲罰🫦）。在這個工作場所，你會遇到接待員、同事和老闆。

自訂女孩角色或使用創意工坊中的預設！




5 天，每天都有一個短篇故事，讓你沉浸式地與同事互動，並挑戰你如何不被老闆發現！如果你被她抓住了，你就輸了，必須重新開始今天的遊戲！




每個故事都有對話，其中包含與女孩們互動的不同進展，例如：邀請她們跟隨你、在她們面前裸體行走、接吻、撫摸和性愛。這些進展將根據你在故事中的選擇解鎖。




在你的工作站，你需要在驗證票據時做出正確的決定！如果你的分數不及格，Boss可能會懲罰你（或者如果你的分數很高，他會獎勵你💋）

🫳💦掌控一切💦✌️

第一人稱視角，玩家可以完全控制自己的移動和臀部動作。決定你的操作方式、你的風格、你的速度。

♾️💦無盡的工作日循環💦♾️


故事結束後，樂趣並未結束！它包含一個無限循環的額外模式，不被發現是繼續享受性愛的關鍵！

✨💦功能清單💦🛠️


以下是遊戲中的功能


  • 模擬一個新人在機構工作
  • 體驗5個短篇故事，與女孩們發展關係
  • 每個故事都有不同的進度解鎖
  • 工作站，包含一些小任務，例如處理支援工單等
  • 坐在椅子上（什麼？工作時每個人都需要舒適！）
  • 如果你失敗了，老闆會懲罰你💋💦（相當溫和）
  • 女孩角色創作器（+女孩工作坊）（200多種體型，100多套可自訂的服裝（紋理圖案、粗糙度等）） 90+ 種逼真的髮型和膚色）
  • 主角角色創作器（150+ 種體型，無服裝選項）
  • 第一人稱視角，完全控制身體動作（可快速輸入使其自動執行）
  • 功能：
    • 自慰（自己和女孩）
    • 接吻
    • 用手觸摸/抓捏胸部/臀部
  • 假陽具（也可使用快速輸入使其自動執行）
  • 部分對話提供“選擇”，這些選擇會影響與女孩們的互動以及短篇故事本身（並非所有故事都如此）
  • 遊戲結束後，新增「工作循環」模式，可以重玩遊戲循環（工作、與女孩們玩樂、不被發現！）
  • 性愛過程中，女孩的快感會逐漸提升（達到 100% 時觸發高潮）
  • 性愛過程中性愛過程中，Boss會根據進度條逐漸警覺（警覺意味著她正朝你走來，你需要避免被她發現！）
  • 性愛過程中，主角的快感也會隨著進度條的推進而提升（你可以選擇是否使用鍵盤觸發高潮）。
  • 隨著Boss的警覺值提升，她更容易被警覺！

data.short_description: 去這家公司上班，然後勾引你的女同事……老闆時時警惕，伺機而動！千萬別被發現，否則你會丟掉工作！你準備好接受這份工作了嗎？
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 德文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: i5 or higher
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeFore GTX 1060 or higher
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: I7 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Gefore RTX 2060 or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間

data.name: Don't Disturb Your BOSS
data.detailed_description:
🏢💦YOU'VE ARRIVED AT THE OFFICE💦🏢

Play as the new guy in this Agency where you need to simulate small working task in order not to get punished (or to get punished 🫦). In this workplace, you'll find the Receptionist, Coworker, and the Boss.

Customize the girls or/and use the presets on the Workshop!


5 Days with each a short story that gives an immersive encounter with your coworkers and that challenges you to not get caught by your BOSS! If you get caught by her, you'll lose and have to restart the day you are playing!


Each story has dialogue that contains different progression to unlock with the girls, such as: asking them to follow you, walking naked in front of them, kissing, touching, and sex. These will be unlock based on your decision within the stories.


At your workstation, you'll have to make good decisions when validating tickets! If your score is not passing, the Boss might punish you (or reward you if it's great 💋)

🫳💦BE THE ONE WHO CONTROL💦✌️

A first-person view mix with full control of the player's movement and hip motion. Decide how you do it, the way you want, at the speed you want.

♾️💦AN ENDLESS WORK DAY TO LOOP💦♾️

Once the story is finished, it doesn't mean the fun is over! It contains an extra mode which loops forever, and not getting caught is the key to continuing to have sex!

✨💦FEATURES LIST💦🛠️

Here the features that can be expected in the game

  • Simulation of a new guy working an Agency
  • Play 5 shorts stories that allow you to progress with the Girls
  • Each stories contains different progress to unlock with the Girls
  • Workstation that has small activities like taking care of support tickets and such
  • Sitting on chairs (what? Everyone need to be comfy while working!)
  • If you failed the Boss will punish you 💋💦(quite soft)
  • Character creator for the girls (+ with the Workshop for the girls) (200+ shapes, 100+ clothes with customization on them (texture patterns, roughness and such), 90+ realistic hair style, skin colors)
  • Character creator for the main character (150+ shapes, no clothes option)
  • Full control over the motion of your body in a First-Person-View (with quick input to make it automatic if desired)
  • Ability to:
    • Masturbate (yourself and the girls)
    • Kiss
    • Use your hands to touch/grab the breast/ass
  • Dildos (also can use quick input to make it automatic)
  • Some dialogue offer "Choices" which impact the progress with the girls and the short story itself (not all the stories)
  • An extra mode "Work Cycle" once the game is completed where you can replay the game loop (workstation, having fun with the girls, not getting caught!)
  • While having sex, the girls has a progression that increase her pleasure (orgasm is triggered when reaching 100% of it)
  • While having sex, the boss has a progression that get her alerted (alert mean she is coming your way and you need to not get caught!
  • While having sex, the MC has a progression that increase his pleasure (you decide to trigger the orgasm or not using the keyboard)
  • The Boss will get more easily alerted has her meter progress!

data.short_description: Start your new job in the agency and seduce your coworker.. The boss is always near and on her toes! Don't get caught, otherwise you'll lose your job! Are you ready to take on the job?
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: i5 or higher
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeFore GTX 1060 or higher
  • Storage: 20 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: I7 or equivalent
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Gefore RTX 2060 or equivalent
  • Storage: 20 GB available space
